Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Pltf'S To Form Interrogatories (Set One) And Request For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Nov-10-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. CROSS-COMPLAINANTs BANYA 2000 LLC and MIKHAIL BRODSKY's Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Plaintifff's To Form Interrogatories (Set One) And Request For Monetary Sanctions is taken off calendar pursuant to the stay issued in the order granting the motion to compel arbitration issued on November 7, 2011. Judge: Marla J. Miller, not reported.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Deem Requests For Admissions(Set One) To Pltf'S As Admitted
Off Calendar Nov-10-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. CROSS-COMPLAINANTs BANYA 2000 LLC and MIKHAIL BRODSKY's Notice of Motion and Motion To Deem Requests For Admissions (Set One) To Plaintiff's As Admitted is taken off calendar pursuant to the stay issued in the order granting the motion to compel arbitration issued on November 7, 2011. Judge: Marla J. Miller, not reported.

Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Compel Arbitration
Off Calendar Nov-07-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
George W. Wolff, Esq., Law Office, 415-788-1881, for Plaintiff/Cross-Defendant and moving party
Alan N. Herzfeld, Esq., and Arthur Meirson, Esq., of Goldstein, Gellman, Melbostad, Harris & McSparran LLP, 415-673-5600 for Defendant/Cross-Complainants and opposing party: Banya 2000 LLC and Mikhail Brodsky

Argued and the Court vacated its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF AND CROSS-DEFENDANT SHAMROCK STRUCTURES, INC.'S PETITION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION AND STAY PROCEEDINGS is Granted. Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Court Reporter: Lavena Ward, CSR 7077
